Serving the interwebz since 2020
Warning! If you can see this text, your browser is too old to load some of the CSS styles.
News Software FuzeVD Fuze Game Mediaboard
Fuze Mediaboard is a self-hosted multimedia messaging platform.

Deploy on your server

A Unix-based system is recommended. Make sure it is internet accessible by the outside world, using port forwarding on your router if necessary.

Follow the README on the GitHub page.

MIT license. View source. Website last updated 9th April 2026
